svg.title: Valve Rack Frame (5x2 Grid) - Orthographic Drawing
svg.desc: Three-view orthographic projection of the valve rack frame. Scale: 3 px/mm. Coordinate system: X=width (0-181mm), Y=depth (0-55mm), Z=height (0-116mm). Origin at front-bottom-left corner of rack frame. Front view (looking along -Y): X horizontal, Z vertical. Side view (looking along -X): Y horizontal, Z vertical. Top view (looking along -Z): X horizontal, Y vertical. 5-wide x 2-high grid of Beduan solenoid valves. Valve pitch X: 37mm c-c. Row pitch Z: 60mm c-c (56mm valve + 4mm gap).
svg.text: Valve Rack Frame (5x2 Grid) - Engineering Drawing
Material: PETG (3D printed) | Envelope: 181W x 55D x 116H mm | Scale: 3 px/mm

g.text: 1. All dimensions in mm. Scale 3 px/mm.
2. Valve: Beduan 2-Way NC solenoid, 12V DC, 1/4" QC fittings (B07NWCQJK9). Qty 10, 113g each.
3. Grid: 5 wide x 2 high. X-pitch 37mm c-c (32.71mm body + 4.29mm gap). Row gap 4mm (Z=56-60mm).
4. T-shaped valve profile: white body (32.71W x 50.84D x 19.4H) + metal coil (31.41W x 36.63H) centered above.
5. Rack cradle: T-shaped saddle per slot. Saddle inner width ~33.5mm. Saddle wall height ~12mm.
6. Retention: 2 snap-over clips per valve at Y=12mm and Y=43mm. Bridge shape with coil cutout.
7. Cable routing: channels along left/right X edges + cross-channel in 4mm inter-row gap.
8. Mounting: 4x M3 heat-set insert bosses on bottom face (2 per side, at Y=10mm and Y=45mm).
9. Spade connectors at valve tops accessible from front/rear (slide on along Y).
10. QC tube ports protrude from both Y faces of rack.
